etc/pmd-configuration.xml.general_idea: Migrate PMD rule references from the legacy 'rulesets' path format to the modern 'category' path format required by newer PMD versions.
etc/pmd-configuration.xml.why_exists: PMD 6.0+ deprecated and removed the old 'rulesets/java/...' reference paths; using them causes a 'Rule reference not found' error during the build.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version to 11 to align with the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce incompatible bytecode if the compiler plugin is not configured for JDK 11 features and class file version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the deprecated `source` and `target` compiler arguments with the unified `release` argument for JDK 11+ compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: The `source` and `target` flags are deprecated in JDK 11+ and may cause warnings or errors; `release` ensures correct API usage and bytecode version.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JVM arguments to export internal JDK compiler modules to the unnamed module, required for Error Prone and NullAway annotation processors.
pom.xml.why_exists: Annotation processors like Error Prone fail at runtime with InaccessibleObjectException on JDK 11+ because internal `com.sun.tools.javac` packages are encapsulated.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the removed `javax.annotation` package from `java.xml.bind`/`java.activation` with the explicit `javax.annotation-api` dependency.
pom.xml.why_exists: The `javax.annotation` package was removed from the JDK in Java 11, causing ClassNotFoundException or compilation errors if not provided as a dependency.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 (Jupiter) by replacing the `junit` dependency with `junit-jupiter-api`, `engine`, and `params`.
pom.xml.why_exists: JUnit 4 runner is not used; tests written for JUnit 5 will fail to run or discover without the Jupiter engine and API dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the obsolete `mockito-all` artifact with `mockito-core` and `mockito-inline`.
pom.xml.why_exists: The `mockito-all` artifact is deprecated and removed in newer Mockito versions; using it causes dependency resolution failures or missing classes.
FindBugs is no longer maintained and its plugin may fail or produce incorrect results on JDK 11+; SpotBugs is the required successor.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the `maven-surefire-plugin` to a version compatible with JUnit 5 and JDK 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Surefire versions do not support the JUnit 5 Platform Launcher, causing tests to be skipped or fail to execute.
